HGSS.202.0000:
Hi!
How’s it going?\f
You’re in the [3403,0001,0000] group with
[0103,0000,0000] as leader, right?\f
Would you like to leave that group
and join another one? [0200,0000]
HGSS.202.0001:
Hi!
How’s it going?\f
You’re in the [3403,0001,0000] group with
[0103,0000,0000] as leader, right?\f
Would you like to leave that group
and make a new one? [0200,0000]
HGSS.202.0002:
Hey, you! I know it’s a little sudden,
but would you like to join a group?\f
If you join a group, you can compete
or cooperate with fellow members.\f
It’s a lot of fun. Want to join? [0200,0000]
HGSS.202.0003: Which group would you like to join? [0200,0000]
HGSS.202.0005:
Oh, you want to make a new group?
Sure thing!\f
The group you made before will be
disbanded, though. Is that OK? [0200,0000]
HGSS.202.0006:
Cool! What do you want to name
your group?
HGSS.202.0007:
The [3403,0000,0000] group, huh?
That’s a great name!\f
The leader is [0103,0001,0000].
I hope the group gets more members.
HGSS.202.0008:
The [3403,0000,0000] group?
[0103,0001,0000] is the leader.\r
Will you join this group? [0200,0000]
HGSS.202.0009:
OK! [0103,0000,0000] is now a member
of the [3403,0001,0000] group.
HGSS.202.0010:
When you form or join a new group,
be sure to visit any Union Room.\f
Mix your records with group members,
and you’ll become integrated.\f
When you’re in the same group,
events can happen simultaneously.\f
It makes things a lot more fun
playing in a group!\f
Anyone can make a new group, and
anyone can join.\f
I hope you recruit lots of friends
so everyone can have fun! [0200,0000]
HGSS.202.0026:
That group?
Didn’t [0103,0000,0000] make it already?
HGSS.202.0027:
Isn’t there already another group
with that name?
